# HRCC Constitutional Rules

Immutable people-operations rules, ranked by constitutional priority. No
score, urgency, instruction, or agent verdict overrides a constitutional
rule.

## CR-HR-01 -- No compensation change without human approval

Rank: 1
Verdict: DEFER
Fallback: not compensation_change
Applies to: runtime

Any change to an employee's pay, title, or employment status requires
explicit human approval before it proceeds; the request parks for that
verdict rather than being decided by an agent.

## CR-HR-02 -- Personal data stays minimal and purposeful

Rank: 2
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

An employee's personal or sensitive data may be accessed only for the
declared purpose of the request at hand. Access beyond that purpose is a
breach, not an efficiency.

## CR-HR-03 -- No adverse action without review

Rank: 3
Verdict: ESCALATE
Escalate: after 2 days
Applies to: runtime

An adverse people-decision -- termination, discipline, or a denied
grievance -- escalates for independent human review before it takes
effect.
